heading: Why most local businesses disappear on social media.
transition: This cycle has a solution. And it doesn't require an agency.

cards.statement: They don't know what to post
cards.title: They don't know what to post
cards.description: Most owners know they should post. But faced with a blank caption, they close the app. No method, no strategy, no execution — just good intentions that never ship.

cards.title: No consistency, no reach
cards.description: Instagram engagement dropped 28% between 2024 and 2025. The algorithm punishes inconsistency. Every week you go silent is a week your competitor's profile gets stronger.

cards.title: Zero competitive visibility
cards.description: You're posting blind. You don't know which topics your local competitors are covering, what they're ignoring, or where the gap is that your audience is waiting for someone to fill.

cards.title: Content doesn't generate leads
cards.description: Posts without local context or a clear CTA don't convert. Likes don't pay the bills — and most organic content never reaches the people who would actually buy from you.
